footer.tagline: Design, engineering and urbanism. A reliable partner at every stage of construction.

home.heroTitle: Architecture that endures - Architectural Bureau PB ARCHITECT
home.heroSubtitle: We design, supervise and plan. PB Architect is the partner that guides you from the first idea to the finished structure.
home.service1Desc: We produce complete technical documentation at all stages — from concept sketch to as-built drawings. Experience in residential, commercial, industrial and public buildings.
home.service2Desc: We provide professional technical supervision and project management. Our team of experienced engineers ensures compliance with the design documentation and regulations.
home.service3Desc: We prepare environmental impact assessments, waste management documentation, accident prevention plans and fire protection plans for industrial facilities.
home.aboutTitle: Expertise and dedication in every project
home.aboutP1: PB Architect is a design bureau based in Novi Sad. We specialise in technical documentation, urbanism and technical supervision. Each project is treated individually — because every client has a unique space, budget and vision.
home.aboutP2: We collaborate with investors, contractors and public institutions through all stages of construction, from obtaining permits to the final technical inspection.
home.contactSubtitle: Contact us for a free consultation.

projektovanje.metaDesc: PB Architect prepares complete technical documentation — from conceptual design to the building permit design.
projektovanje.heroSubtitle: Preparing technical documentation for Category A family residential buildings is a systematic process that begins with the client's requirements and ends with the issuance of a building permit. PB Architect guides you through every stage.
projektovanje.step1Desc: The first stage in which the programme requirements are defined together with the investor: approximate floor area, room layout (number of rooms, bathrooms, etc.), materials and required infrastructure capacities. A well-defined project brief is the foundation of a successful project.
projektovanje.step2Desc: Based on the project brief, a Conceptual Design is prepared, showing the concept of the building and submitted with the Request for Location Conditions. The IDR defines the position of the building on the plot, dimensions, and infrastructure connection parameters.
projektovanje.step3Desc: A unified procedure conducted before the competent administrative authority on behalf of the investor, through an authorised representative. Location Conditions is a document that defines all urban planning and technical conditions for construction.
projektovanje.step4Desc: The final stage of technical documentation. The PGD is submitted with the Request for Issuance of a Building Permit Decision. For buildings up to 400 m² GFA, the PGD includes the architectural section with all required drawings and descriptions.
projektovanje.step5Desc: A unified procedure before the competent local administrative authority. Once the Building Permit Decision is obtained, legal construction of the building can begin.
projektovanje.step6Desc: Before work begins, the construction site must be registered. During construction, professional technical supervision is carried out to ensure compliance with the design documentation.
projektovanje.step7Desc: Upon completion of construction, a technical inspection of the building is carried out. After a positive report from the technical inspection committee, an occupancy permit is issued, which is a condition for registering the building and using it legally.
projektovanje.ss1Desc: The initial design stage that defines the concept of the building and obtains location conditions.
projektovanje.ss2Desc: The key stage of technical documentation required for obtaining the building permit decision.
projektovanje.ss3Desc: We create functional and aesthetically consistent interior solutions tailored to your needs and style.
projektovanje.ss4Desc: We design courtyards, plots, gardens, fences, porches and other external spaces.
projektovanje.ss5Desc: We prepare precise investment cost estimates based on current market prices.

idr.metaDesc: The conceptual design is the initial design stage that defines the concept of the building and obtains location conditions.
idr.heroSubtitle: The first design stage that establishes the concept of the future building and is the basis for obtaining location conditions.
idr.p1: The Conceptual Design (IDR) is a form of project submitted with the Request for Issuance of Location Conditions. Under the Rulebook that came into force in April 2015, the IDR has a precisely defined content and only the Architecture section is submitted for location conditions, certified by the responsible licensed engineer.
idr.p2: The IDR shows the planned concept of the building: its position on the plot, dimensions (horizontal and vertical envelope), planned infrastructure connection capacities (water and sewage, electricity, heating) and relevant urban planning parameters.
idr.drawing2: Floor plans of all characteristic storeys and roof
idr.drawing4: All elevations of the building at appropriate scale
idr.basis1: Survey plan (prepared by a licensed surveyor)
idr.basis3: Additional documentation depending on the specifics of the building
idr.nextPhaseText: After submitting the IDR and obtaining Location Conditions, the next stage begins — preparing the Building Permit Design.

pgd.metaDesc: The PGD is the final stage of technical documentation submitted with the request for a building permit decision.
pgd.heroSubtitle: The final and most important stage of technical documentation for buildings up to 400 m² GFA — the basis for obtaining the building permit decision.
pgd.p1: The Building Permit Design (PGD) is the technical documentation submitted with the Request for Issuance of a Building Permit Decision. For buildings with a gross floor area (GFA) of up to 400 m², the PGD is the key and final design stage.
pgd.p2: It is important to note that after the PGD is adopted — i.e. the Building Permit Decision is issued — the designed solutions cannot be changed without amending the decision itself. For this reason, the precision and completeness of the PGD is of paramount importance.
pgd.scopeTitle: What the PGD for buildings up to 400 m² GFA covers
pgd.scopeIntro: In accordance with the law and subordinate legislation, the PGD for this category of buildings comprises one part:
pgd.scope1: Volume 1 — Architecture: structural-technical, technological and operational characteristics of the building
pgd.scope2: Description of complete equipment and installations
pgd.scope5: Conditions for future maintenance of the building
pgd.basis1: Location conditions — define all parameters for preparing technical documentation
pgd.basis2: Certified cadastral-topographic plan (KTP) — prepared by a licensed surveyor
pgd.basis3: Geotechnical report — defines soil composition and foundation conditions (mandatory for the Belgrade area, and as required at other locations)
pgd.nextText: After completing the PGD, a request for the Building Permit Decision is submitted to the competent local administrative authority.

enterijer.metaDesc: PB Architect designs functional and aesthetically consistent interior solutions — flats, houses, commercial and hospitality premises.
enterijer.heroSubtitle: An interior space that reflects your identity. Every solution is created in dialogue with the client — because a well-designed interior is one that suits the lifestyle or business.
enterijer.p1: Whether it is a private house, flat, commercial space or hospitality venue, PB Architect approaches interior design as an integrative process combining aesthetics, functionality and feasibility.
enterijer.p2: Our approach involves a thorough understanding of the client's wishes and needs, spatial analysis, and creating a solution that reflects the user's individuality — while respecting the budget and technical requirements.
enterijer.scope1: Conceptual layout of spaces and furniture
enterijer.scope2: Selection of materials, colours and textures

eksterijer.metaDesc: Design of courtyards, plots, gardens, fences, porches and other external spaces.
eksterijer.heroSubtitle: The external space is an extension of your building. We design courtyards, plots, garden areas and all associated exterior elements.
eksterijer.p1: PB Architect designs external spaces that are functional, visually appealing and in harmony with the character of the building and its surroundings. Each exterior is unique, arising from an analytical approach to the location, climate and user needs.

proracuni.metaDesc: Precise investment cost estimates for construction based on current market prices.
proracuni.heroSubtitle: A realistic and precise construction cost estimate — a key tool for investment planning and making informed decisions.
proracuni.p1: PB Architect prepares investment cost estimates based on current market prices for materials and labour. The estimate is based on the adopted design documentation and provides the investor with a clear picture of the financial framework of the project.
proracuni.p2: Precise budget planning enables timely adjustments to design solutions, selection of optimal materials and prevention of unforeseen costs during construction.
proracuni.ctaDesc: Send us the basic details of your planned building and you will receive an indicative cost estimate as soon as possible.

urbanizam.metaDesc: PB Architect prepares urban projects, land parcellation projects and urban plans for various investors and locations.
urbanizam.heroSubtitle: PB Architect provides urban planning and design services — from individual plots to complex urban areas.
urbanizam.intro: Through years of practice we have gained experience in independently preparing and contributing to urban projects for various investors. Based on these UPs, we carried out site development that enabled the obtaining of location conditions and building permits, on the basis of which numerous buildings were constructed. We have also prepared a large number of parcellation and re-parcellation projects that created the conditions for improved construction across various sites.
urbanizam.ss1Desc: Preparation of urban projects for the urban-architectural design of sites and obtaining location conditions.
urbanizam.ss2Desc: Formation and reorganisation of cadastral parcels as a condition for better construction and legalisation at given sites.
urbanizam.ss3Desc: Participation in the preparation of detailed regulation plans (PDR) and other planning documents at the level of the local government unit.

urbanistickiProjekat.metaDesc: Preparation of urban projects for the urban-architectural development of sites and obtaining location conditions.
urbanistickiProjekat.heroSubtitle: The UP is an urban planning instrument that enables precise site development and creates conditions for obtaining location conditions and building permits.
urbanistickiProjekat.p1: PB Architect prepares urban projects (UP) at the request of investors or when determined by a planning document. An Urban Project is prepared for the urban-architectural design of public spaces and the development of specific sites.
urbanistickiProjekat.p2: The UP is prepared in accordance with the urban plan, the spatial plan of the local government unit, or the spatial plan of an area of special purpose. In addition, a UP may be prepared for the construction of a building serving an agricultural holding, rural tourism, nautical or hunting tourism, in areas not covered by directly applicable planning documents.
urbanistickiProjekat.defines1: The urban-architectural concept of the site
urbanistickiProjekat.defines2: Planned parcellation (for UPs covering multiple plots)
urbanistickiProjekat.defines3: Level of infrastructure and utility provision
urbanistickiProjekat.defines4: Conditions for forming the construction parcel
urbanistickiProjekat.step2: Preparation of Conceptual Design (IDR) as the basis for the UP — approximately 20 working days
urbanistickiProjekat.step3: Obtaining conditions from competent companies and institutions — approximately 25 working days
urbanistickiProjekat.step4: Drafting the UP — 15 working days from receipt of all conditions
urbanistickiProjekat.step5: Submission of the UP draft to the local government unit for public presentation
urbanistickiProjekat.step6: Publication of public invitation for the presentation (7 days before public presentation)
urbanistickiProjekat.step7: Public presentation of the UP draft — 7 calendar days
urbanistickiProjekat.step8: Review at the Planning Committee session — no later than 10 days after the end of public presentation
urbanistickiProjekat.step10: Completing the UP and submitting for certification — 2 working days after the procedure is concluded
urbanistickiProjekat.step11: Confirmation of the UP by the competent local government authority

parcelacija.metaDesc: Preparation of parcellation and re-parcellation projects for cadastral parcels as a condition for better construction.
parcelacija.heroSubtitle: Precise formation and reorganisation of parcels — a prerequisite for planned and lawful construction across diverse sites.
parcelacija.p1: PB Architect prepares parcellation and re-parcellation projects for the formation of new cadastral parcels or the reorganisation of existing ones. These projects are a necessary prerequisite for aligning the cadastral status with planning documentation, which opens the possibility of obtaining permits and legalising buildings.
parcelacija.p2: Parcellation projects are prepared in cooperation with an authorised geodetic bureau and in accordance with the planning documentation applicable to the given location.
parcelacija.whenTitle: When is a parcellation project needed
parcelacija.when1: Formation of a new construction parcel
parcelacija.when2: Division of one parcel into several smaller ones
parcelacija.when4: Aligning the cadastral status with the planning document
parcelacija.when5: Regulation of plot boundaries between neighbours

urbanistickiPlanovi.metaDesc: Participation in preparing detailed regulation plans (PDR) and other planning documents at the local government level.
urbanistickiPlanovi.heroSubtitle: Strategic and spatial planning as the foundation for organised and sustainable use of space.
urbanistickiPlanovi.p1: PB Architect participates in the preparation of detailed regulation plans (PDR) and other planning documents that regulate the use of space at the level of the local government unit. Experience gained through work on various PDRs covers residential, commercial, mixed-use and infrastructure corridor zones.
urbanistickiPlanovi.p2: The urban plan is the foundation for every subsequent level of design. A well-prepared planning document provides legal certainty to investors and coherence in the development of the given area.
urbanistickiPlanovi.type3: Spatial plan of the local government unit
urbanistickiPlanovi.type4: Spatial plan of an area of special purpose

inzenjering.metaDesc: Professional technical supervision and management of architectural and civil engineering projects in the field of high-rise construction.
inzenjering.heroSubtitle: From design to completed building — our team of experts monitors the realisation at every step, from laying the foundations to the final technical inspection.
inzenjering.p1: PB Architect provides professional engineering supervision services for construction works in the field of high-rise construction. Our team ensures that every building is constructed according to the adopted design documentation, in compliance with applicable technical regulations and professional standards.
inzenjering.p2: The presence of a qualified supervisory engineer on site is not merely a legal obligation — it is a guarantee that your building will be constructed to a high quality, safely and without costly errors that could occur without expert oversight.
inzenjering.aspect1Body: We monitor every stage of construction and verify compliance with the design documentation, technical regulations and quality standards.
inzenjering.aspect2Body: We mediate between the investor and contractors, manage the construction schedule and ensure that every stage proceeds according to plan.
inzenjering.aspect3Body: We organise and conduct the technical inspection procedure for the building as a prerequisite for obtaining the occupancy permit.
inzenjering.aspect4Body: We maintain and verify complete construction site documentation — site diaries, interim certificates, test certificates and material quality confirmations.

zastita.metaDesc: Environmental impact assessments, waste management documentation and protection plans for industrial facilities.
zastita.heroSubtitle: Compliance with environmental regulations is not just an obligation — it is a responsibility to the community and future generations.
zastita.p1: PB Architect prepares all necessary documentation in the field of environmental protection for commercial entities, investors and public institutions. Our services cover the complete range of obligations prescribed by environmental legislation.
zastita.p2: We have particular experience in preparing documentation for industrial facilities, buildings with an elevated environmental risk and buildings in protected area zones.
zastita.doc1Body: Preparation of a study assessing the potential impacts of a planned building or activity on the environment, in accordance with legal requirements and public review procedures.
zastita.doc2Body: Technical documentation defining environmental protection measures and conditions during the design and construction of buildings.
zastita.doc3Body: Waste management plans for commercial entities and installations, in accordance with waste management regulations.
zastita.doc4Body: Documentation and fire protection plans for industrial and other high-risk work environments, compliant with applicable fire protection regulations.

kontakt.metaDesc: Contact PB Architect — design, engineering and urbanism in Novi Sad.
kontakt.heroSubtitle: Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.
kontakt.workHours: Working hours: Monday to Friday, 9 am to 5 pm. For urgent inquiries, feel free to call us directly.

contactForm.successText: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactForm.errorNetwork: Error sending message. Please check your internet connection.
